text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before the race, Satono Diamond's
parents call her to cheer her on. She says she
wants to win a G1 race for them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning of the Satsuki Sho and the
weather is stormy. We head to the racecourse by
taxi, but get stuck in traffic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, we're going to be late for the race.
Satono Diamond gets out of the taxi and runs the
rest of the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suspects it's all due to her family jinx.
However, it makes her all the more determined to
become strong enough to break it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond manages to make it in time, and
is finally going to race in the Satsuki Sho!
